message:
fix(privacy+chaos): DP composition and defensive return corrections

Two cross-agent code review fixes:

1. privacy.rs: Laplace noise was applied to 3 independent fields
   (message_count, byte_count, error_count) using full epsilon each,
   but only 1×epsilon was charged to the budget. By basic DP
   composition, releasing 3 quantities costs 3×per-field-epsilon.
   Fix: divide epsilon by 3 for each field so the total composition
   stays within the single charged budget.

2. chaos.rs: next_delay() and next_wakeup_count() had defensive early
   returns using range.start instead of the zero-excluded min value.
   While unreachable in practice, the return values were incorrect
   when zero-exclusion bumped min above range.start.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
